mode: ensemble-4+1 (2x Opus 4.8 + 2x Codex gpt-5.5 xhigh blind, Fable 5 arbiter)

items.title: Fed decision July 2026 | Maintain (hike of 0bps)
items.rationale: R1 blind: Opus 0.84/0.90, Codex 0.82/0.81 (raw FedWatch anchor 0.812). R2 crux: futures term-premium bias + Kalshi-as-evidence + Jul-3 soft jobs data. Both families converged 0.87/0.88: raw FedWatch understates hold, but Kalshi 0.905 and FedWatch are correlated observations, not independent; ~12% hike tail from hawkish June dots survives. Consensus 0.875 sits between the two markets -> no edge after fees on either side.
sources: June 17 FOMC statement/dots (12-0 hold, median +25bp by YE2026, 9/19 see hike)
MarketWatch (Codex live check): July hike odds fell after jobs data
Exa search 2026-07-03: rate-hike risk recedes headlines

items.title: Trump attends 2026 FIFA World Cup Final
items.rationale: R1 blind: Opus 0.93/0.88, Codex 0.86/0.88. Explicit Infantino joint-presentation announcement + same-stadium Club WC precedent vs 16-day tail (health at 80, security, optics reversal). Consensus 0.8875 vs ask 0.87: +0.8pt net, below threshold. No round 2 - estimates clustered, no crux.
sources: BBC Sport 2026-06-23: Infantino confirms Trump to attend and present trophy
Fox News 2026-06-23: joint trophy presentation plan

items.title: How high will BTC get in July? | Above $65,000 (BRTI trimmed-mean touch)
items.rationale: R1 blind: Opus 0.58/0.60, Codex 0.62/0.65. All four independently derived reflection-principle ~0.65 (barrier +4.9% = 0.45 monthly sigma) then trimmed for smoothed-index drag and mixed flow signals. Consensus 0.6125 vs ask 0.63: no edge. Arbiter MC model (20k paths, mu 0/+-20%) gave 0.574-0.66, fully consistent.
sources: Coinbase BTC-USD: spot 61963, vol30 37.7% ann, July high 62148
CoinDesk/Cointelegraph RSS 2026-07-03: whale accumulation, ETF inflows resumed, options skeptical
